typography.notes: No Inter. Use Outfit for Headings to provide a modern, structural feel. Use Manrope for body text for exceptional legibility at small sizes.

layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: Use p-6 or p-8 for card internals. p-4 only for tight lists.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat solid background (#FFFFFF), sharp 1px border (#E5E2DC), very subtle ambient shadow (shadow-sm). No heavy drop shadows.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, full for floating buttons.

voice_command_mic.default_state: Floating action button, bg-[#D99B58] text-white shadow-lg, positioned fixed bottom-8 right-8.
voice_command_mic.listening_state: bg-[#C86753] with a multi-layered pulsing ring animation (using tailwind animate-ping layered behind the button). The icon should gently pulse.

micro_interactions.buttons: Subtle scale down (active:scale-95) and background hover state shift.
micro_interactions.cards: No lift on hover for dashboard cards to maintain 'Control Room' stability, only border color shift.

components.navigation: Sidebar on desktop (sticky, w-64), bottom tab bar on mobile. Must not use transparent header.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Line charts for trends (smooth curve, stroke: #D99B58), Bar charts for monthly comparison, Pie chart for categories. Tooltips must have dark earthy background (#1E3F32) with white text.
components.forms: Shadcn UI base but customized with #E5E2DC borders. Inputs should have h-12 for better touch targets.
components.icons: lucide-react for standard icons. Keep stroke-width at 1.5 for a premium feel.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='voice-mic-button', data-testid='add-transaction-submit').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on buttons. #D99B58 needs dark text or very bold white text depending on APCA. We will use #FFFFFF text on #2C3D30 primary buttons.

login_background.description: Abstract calming architectural 3d illustration, bone white walls with deep olive green plants. Used for one half of the login/register screen.

empty_state_savings.description: Minimalist 3D terracotta piggy bank for empty savings or 'no transactions' state.

user_avatar.description: Professional Indonesian man headshot for default user profile picture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard in Bahasa Indonesia as requested.
Apply Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). Do NOT use default Tailwind blues, purples, teals, or 'slop' gradients. Stick to the provided Hex codes.
Implement the Web Speech API for the voice command button. It must recognize Indonesian (lang: 'id-ID').
When listening, the mic button MUST have a pulsing animation to indicate active recording.
Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, dialogs, and forms. Use Recharts for the financial charts.
Ensure the dashboard utilizes a bento grid structure where charts and summary widgets align cleanly.
All interactive components MUST use data-testid for testing.
